con:config.con:request:
${#Project#baseUrl}/posts GET
200
<con:assertion type="Response SLA" id="req-p-r01-sla" name="Response Time < 5s">
5000
$ 0 false
$[0].id true false
$[0].title true false
$[0].body true false

201

5000

$.userId ${#Project#userId} false false false

201

5000
$.id true false
$.name comment name 1 false false false
$.email true false
